text:
Here are three tongue-in-cheek motivational quotes:

1. "Remember, you're not procrastinating—you're just giving your future self the gift of urgency. They'll appreciate the adrenaline rush."

2. "Sure, you could fail spectacularly at this thing you're about to attempt. But you could also succeed spectacularly, which would make for a much better story at parties."

3. "The difference between you and successful people isn't talent or luck—it's that they also thought they were faking it the whole time, but they just kept going anyway."
